query: I'm setting up authentication for our new headless storefront and I need to create a client with the right scopes, including a custom c_loyalty scope for our loyalty API. How do I provision this?
I need a shopper access token to test some API endpoints with curl. What's the quickest way to get one for my RefArch site?
Our security team wants us to rotate the client secret on our existing shopper auth client and also add a new scope. How do I update it?

We're launching a new mobile app that needs its own auth client separate from our web storefront. I need to create it with a specific set of allowed scopes and a particular redirect URI. Walk me through provisioning that.
I need to clean up old auth clients that were created during development. Can I get a list of all the shopper login clients on our tenant so I can identify which ones are safe to delete?

We're migrating from session-based auth to token-based for our PWA and I need to understand how to set up the client credentials for guest and registered shopper flows. I also need to make sure the scopes cover our custom APIs.
I need an admin API token so my CI pipeline can make Data API calls to import product data. How do I authenticate?
How do I set up an API client in Account Manager with the right roles for deploying code to our sandboxes?
I want to implement passwordless login using magic links in my storefront. What's the flow for sending a login email and handling the callback?
My dw.json has client_id and client_secret for the CLI but it's not authenticating. How do I troubleshoot the OAuth token exchange?
